title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. ramealis
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. ramealis, also known as the wild rose, is a fragrant, flowering plant belonging to the rose family. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. ramealis include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support digestive health. Rosa × dumetorum subvar. ramealis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
